case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROMAN V NELEDVA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF TRISTAN P ESPINOSA ESQ RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 200003926) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT NELEDVA, ROMAN V SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2019
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007118)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
